text:
Subject: Help connecting Salesforce
Body: Hi there, I just signed up for Nexus and I'm trying to connect our Salesforce account. When I click "Connect Salesforce" it redirects me to login, but then I get an error saying "Authentication Failed". I'm using my admin credentials and I'm sure the password is correct. Is there something else I need to enable in Salesforce first? Thanks, Sarah Mitchell Bright Horizon Consulting
SenderDomain: brighthorizonltd.com

Subject: Question about sync timing
Body: Hello, We're on the Professional plan and I noticed our Salesforce contacts are syncing to Marketo, but there's about a 10-minute delay. The documentation says Professional plans get real-time sync within 5 minutes. Is this normal? Do I need to configure something differently to get faster syncing? Best regards, Michael O'Brien DataFlow Solutions Inc.
SenderDomain: dataflowsolutions.com

Subject: Custom field mapping not working
Body: Hi support team, I'm trying to map our custom field "Customer_Lifetime_Value__c" from Salesforce to a field in our email platform, but I can't find it in the field mapping dropdown. The field definitely exists in Salesforce and I have access to it. How do I get custom fields to show up in Nexus? Thanks, Alex Rivera Horizon E-commerce Platform
SenderDomain: horizonecom.com

Subject: Just started trial - where do I begin?
Body: Hello, I just signed up for the 14-day trial and I'm feeling a bit overwhelmed. We want to connect HubSpot and Mailchimp, but I'm not sure where to start or what the steps are. Is there a quick start guide or video I can follow? Thanks! Rebecca Kim Prism Design Studios
SenderDomain: prismdesign.co

Subject: Encryption standards question
Body: Hi, Our compliance team is asking about your encryption standards. Specifically: 1. Is data encrypted at rest and in transit? 2. What encryption protocols do you use? We need this for our internal security review. Thanks, Margaret Chen CTO, Pinnacle Financial Services
SenderDomain: pinnaclefinancial.com

Subject: SOC 2 report for vendor assessment
Body: Hello Nexus team, We're evaluating your platform as part of our vendor assessment process. Can you provide your most recent SOC 2 Type II report? We're prepared to sign an NDA if required. Also, do you have ISO 27001 certification? Best regards, Angela Ramirez Fortress Cybersecurity
SenderDomain: fortresscyber.com

Subject: HIPAA compliance verification
Body: Hi, We're a healthcare organization and we need to verify that Nexus is HIPAA compliant. We already have an Enterprise plan with you, but we need to ensure our BAA is up to date. Can someone confirm our HIPAA compliance status and send us the current BAA? Thanks, Dr. Samantha Lee CIO, Odyssey Healthcare Systems
SenderDomain: odysseyhealthcare.com

Subject: Quick question about data storage
Body: Hi there, Where are your servers located? We're based in California and need to know if our data stays in the US or if it's stored internationally. Also, can we choose which region our data is stored in? Thanks, Michelle Park Dynasty Retail Group
SenderDomain: dynastyretail.com

Subject: Starter vs Professional - help me decide
Body: Hi, We're currently on the Starter plan but we're growing fast. I'm trying to understand what we get if we upgrade to Professional. Specifically, we need to connect more than 3 integrations soon, and we want faster syncing. What's the real difference between the plans? Jordan Taylor Velocity Sports Management
SenderDomain: velocitysports.com

Subject: Nonprofit pricing?
Body: Hello, We're a nonprofit healthcare clinic and we're interested in your Professional plan. Do you offer any discounts for nonprofit organizations? If so, what documentation do you need from us? Best, Dr. Emily Rodriguez Coastal Healthcare Services
SenderDomain: coastalhealth.org

Subject: Enterprise pricing for large deployment
Body: Hi Nexus team, We're a 500-person investment firm evaluating your platform. We'd need: - 20+ integrations - Around 500,000 API calls per month - SSO with our Okta setup - Dedicated support Can you provide Enterprise pricing for this scope? We're also evaluating two competitors, so timeline matters. Bradley Thompson Managing Partner, RedRock Investment Partners
SenderDomain: redrockip.com

Subject: Question about API limits
Body: Hello, We're on Professional plan (50,000 API calls/month) but we're consistently hitting 55,000-60,000 calls. I got an email saying we'll be charged overage fees. How much is the overage cost per 1,000 calls? And would it be cheaper to just upgrade to Enterprise? Thanks, Jennifer Wu Apex Technologies Group
SenderDomain: apextech.com

Subject: Application for Senior Software Engineer position
Body: Dear Hiring Manager, I am writing to express my interest in the Senior Software Engineer position I saw posted on LinkedIn. I have 8 years of experience in full-stack development with a focus on integration platforms and APIs. I've attached my resume and portfolio for your consideration. I'm particularly excited about Nexus's mission to simplify business integrations. Looking forward to hearing from you. Best regards, Daniel Chen danielchen.dev@gmail.com
SenderDomain: gmail.com

Subject: Partnership opportunity
Body: Hi Nexus team, I run a technology consulting firm that works with mid-size businesses. We're always looking for integration solutions to recommend to our clients. I'd like to explore a referral partnership or reseller arrangement. Who should I speak with about this? Thanks, Thomas Warren CEO, Warren Tech Consulting
SenderDomain: techconsult.io

Subject: Summer internship opportunities
Body: Hello, I'm a computer science student at State University graduating in 2026. I'm very interested in API development and integration platforms. Do you offer summer internships? I'd love to learn more about opportunities at Nexus. Thank you, Sarah Martinez sarah.student@university.edu
SenderDomain: university.edu

Subject: Top software engineers available now
Body: Hi there, I'm a technical recruiter with access to amazing software engineering talent. We specialize in placing senior engineers, architects, and engineering managers. Are you currently hiring? I have 3 excellent candidates available immediately. Let me know if you'd like to schedule a call. Best, Jason Miller TalentScout Recruiting
SenderDomain: talentscout.com

Subject: Missing invoice for December
Body: Hi, Our accounting department is asking about the December invoice. We're on the Starter Annual plan and we should have been billed on December 15th, but we haven't received an invoice yet. Can you resend it to accounting@summitfinancial.com? Thanks, Robert Jameson Summit Financial Advisors
SenderDomain: summitfinancial.com

Subject: Enterprise contract renewal
Body: Hello, Our Enterprise contract is up for renewal in March. We'd like to discuss renewal terms and potentially adding more integrations. Who should I contact about this? Should I reach out to our account manager directly? William Foster VP Technology, Spectrum Telecom Group
SenderDomain: spectrumtelecom.com

Subject: Your checking account statement
Body: Dear Customer, Your monthly checking account statement is now available. Please log in to view your statement and recent transactions. If you have questions about your account, please contact us at 1-800-BANK-123. Sincerely, Random Bank Customer Service
SenderDomain: randombank.com

Subject: Data Processing Agreement needed
Body: Hi Nexus, We're in final stages of evaluation and our legal team needs a signed Data Processing Agreement (DPA) that covers GDPR requirements. We're a pharmaceutical company with EU operations. Can you provide this? We'd also need any relevant privacy documentation. Thanks, Dr. Nathan Foster Clearwater Pharmaceuticals
SenderDomain: clearwaterpharma.com
